summary: Heavily focused on building a SaaS crypto trading platform with AI capabilities, alongside significant work on embedded firmware for input emulation and a Windows kernel driver. Also maintained several research projects in crypto modeling, computer vision for poker, and various automation tools.

items.title: Windows input filter driver development
items.description: Built and iterated on a kernel-level input filtering and injection driver for Windows.

items.title: Crypto trading platform development
items.description: Iterated on a SaaS crypto algorithmic trading platform, focusing on infrastructure, user onboarding, and security hardening.

items.title: Firmware for ESP32-S3 input emulation
items.description: Developed new firmware variants for a feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation device.

items.title: File tagging utility for Windows Explorer
items.description: Polished a Windows Explorer extension for tagging files and folders, including release automation.

items.title: Personal CV and input automation project
items.description: Worked on a computer vision and input automation utility.

items.title: Custom firmware for e-reader device
items.description: Added map and knowledge base applications to a custom e-reader firmware.

items.title: Crypto price prediction model research
items.description: Conducted experiments on machine learning architectures for cryptocurrency price prediction.

items.title: Android LLM assistant with phone control
items.description: Built an on-device LLM assistant capable of using phone functions, focusing on model routing and tool execution.

items.title: E-ink note-taking launcher for Android
items.description: Developed a minimal Android launcher centered around note-taking for e-ink devices.

items.title: Graph-powered code intelligence engine
items.description: Developed a codebase indexing tool that builds knowledge graphs for AI agents and developers.

items.title: Personal Neovim development environment
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim configuration for a full IDE setup.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Built a minimalistic, browser-based labeling tool for YOLO object detection projects.

items.title: Computer vision for online poker
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for interpreting and validating online poker game states.

items.title: Crypto trading platform foundation
items.description: Started a complete rewrite of a crypto trading platform, laying the groundwork for a new SaaS product.

items.title: Multi-session AI coding tool
items.description: Built an autonomous AI coding assistant capable of managing multiple work sessions.

items.title: Freqtrade trading strategies
items.description: Developed and optimized numerous algorithmic trading strategies for the Freqtrade platform.

items.title: Telegram bot for trading management
items.description: Created a Telegram bot interface for managing and monitoring multiple Freqtrade instances.

items.title: Mobile trading monitor
items.description: Built a mobile application for monitoring the performance of algorithmic trading bots.

items.title: Telegram automation tooling
items.description: Worked on a personal Telegram automation and content forwarding tool.

items.title: Algorithmic trading strategy research
items.description: Experimented with and optimized various trading strategies for the Freqtrade platform.

items.title: Crypto trading signal bot
items.description: Developed a Telegram bot for generating and sharing cryptocurrency trading signals.
